Key features

Getting Started

Latest news

Gravity abstracts the technical complexities of multi-chain interactions by integrating advanced technologies like Zero-Knowledge Proofs, state-of-the-art consensus mechanisms, and restaking-powered architecture to ensure high performance, enhanced security, and cost efficiency.

Cross-Chain Transactions

Engineered for Mass Adoption.

Engineered for Mass Adoption. With Gravity, developers are empowered to create a variety of innovative solutions for web3 users while tapping into 20 million users in the Galxe ecosystem.

Learn more

Balance Abstraction with Yield

Gravity's native omnichain intent protocol enables developers to offer users a yield-enabled unified balance across all chains, ensuring seamless cross-chain transactions and verifications.

Omnichain Loyalty Points

Powered by a new level of scalability and low transaction cost, developers can easily turn loyalty points fully onchain, minimizing the friction and maximizing the transparency. 

Gravity is the cosmic glue that holds the blockchain ecosystem together.

Rollout

Q3 2024

Gravity Alpha Mainnet Launch

Gravity Alpha Mainnet is an Ethereum rollup powered by Arbitrum Nitro stack.

Q2 2025

Gravity Mainnet Launch

The mainnet of Gravity is a restaking-powered PoS Layer 1. Gravity will also integrate Reth as its EVM execution engine.

The Magnet Chain for Web3. Gravity is a Layer 1 blockchain designed for mass adoption and an omnichain future.
